title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo – get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, multi-model, file upload, RAG, admin panel).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive terminal UI (TUI) for chatting with Ollama models; written in Go.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like assistant.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama (Spring Boot starters included).

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Camunda 8 connector that invokes Ollama models inside BPMN processes.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language wrapper for Ollama’s REST API with async/await.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library for Ollama with build.zig integration.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app exposing Ollama models via REST & GraphQL endpoints with token auth.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Python Slack Bolt bot that answers questions using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord.py bot bringing Ollama models to any Discord server.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for LLM-assisted writing using Ollama.
